title: ceratostema portoricense
intro: Ceratostema portoricense is a type of medicinal plant, also known as 'Ilex portoricensis', which belongs to the family Aquifoliaceae and is native to the Caribbean. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ceratostema portoricense include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal infusions, teas, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
